case_title: CAPITAL BANK & TRUST COMPANY, A DIVISION OF VS. CHARITABLE LEADERSHIP FOUNDATION et al

docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL BANK & TRUST COMPANY, A DIVISION OF CHEMUNG CANAL TRUST COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CHARITABLE LEADERSHIP FOUNDATION CENTER FOR MEDICAL SCIENCE, INC.
